assessor_1_raw: Bootstrap CI for classification metrics is appropriate. Standard bootstrap is defensible for ticket-level classification with aggregate metrics. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Ablation models (A/B/C vs Baseline) are given consistent tuning via the same validation set. This is correct. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Temporal drift detection via 3-month bins within the test window provides monitoring of label distribution changes. This is a design strength. Verdict: defense_wins.
